scenarios.title: §24-A architecture tree reflects the live registry count of 17 (incl. Card Rewards)

scenarios.title: TestConnectorCountContract pins §24-A as a 4th surface with adversarial proof
scenarios.linkedDoD: Scope 1 DoD: assertConnectorCountContract folds §24-A 'Connector plugins (N committed)' as a 4th surface via smackerelMdTreeRe + parseSmackerelMdTreeCount + a new adversarial sub-test — Scenario 'BUG-024-006-SCN-002 TestConnectorCountContract pins §24-A as a 4th surface with adversarial proof'.

scenarios.title: Adversarial RED proves the §24-A pin is non-tautological before the doc fix turns it GREEN

linkedTests.function: ./smackerel.sh test unit --go --go-run 'TestConnectorCountContract' --verbose  # RED before §24-A edit (§24-A=16 vs runtime=17), GREEN after

evidenceRefs: report.md (RED run captured before docs/smackerel.md §24-A edit)
report.md (GREEN run captured after docs/smackerel.md §24-A edit)
scenarios.linkedDoD: Scope 1 DoD: pre-fix RED proof (§24-A=16 vs runtime=17) + post-fix GREEN proof (exit 0) — Scenario 'BUG-024-006-SCN-003 Adversarial RED proves the §24-A pin is non-tautological before the doc fix turns it GREEN'.

scenarios.title: Parent spec 024 governance backfill records BUG-024-006 closure without leaving status: done

linkedTests.function: python3 -c 'import json; d=json.load(open("specs/024-design-doc-reconciliation/state.json")); assert any(b.get("bugId","").startswith("BUG-024-006") for b in d.get("resolvedBugs", []))'  # exits 0

scenarios.linkedDoD: Scope 1 DoD: parent state.json::resolvedBugs[] contains BUG-024-006; lastUpdatedAt bumped; report.md carries the resolution section; spec 024 stays status: done — Scenario 'BUG-024-006-SCN-004 Parent spec 024 governance backfill records BUG-024-006 closure without leaving status: done'.
